source_pr.title: config: make the test `TestPDConfHandler` stable
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #15330 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: make the test `TestPDConfHandler` stable

### What is changed and how it works?
The root cause is that the config manager updates the global config pointer after finishing reload:
```
    ...
    ch.reloadFunc(oldConf, mergedConf)
    ch.curConf.Store(mergedConf)
    ...
```
But in `TestPDConfHandler`, we will check the global config immediately after reloading in another goroutine, and at that time, the update operation `Store(conf)` may not be processed.

```
reloadFunc = fund() {
    ...
    reloadWg.Done()
}
NewConfManager(reloadFunc)
...
reloadWg.Wait()
Check the config ...
```

|  time   | conf manager goroutine  | test goroutine |
|  ----  | ----  | ---- |
| 1  | reload | |
| 2  |  | check << fail |
| 3  | store | |

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

symptoms: PR body explains TestPDConfHandler race (reloadFunc done before global config pointer Store), causing intermittent check failure.
failure_signature: PR body explains TestPDConfHandler race (reloadFunc done before global config pointer Store), causing intermittent check failure.
root_cause_explanation: TestPDConfHandler had an async ordering race: the reload callback could signal completion before the config manager goroutine stored the updated global config pointer, so an immediate check could read stale config. This PR waits for an additional reload tick (reloadWg2) to ensure the store has happened before asserting, removing the race window.
fix_pattern: Synchronize async reload/store ordering: wait for an additional reload tick (reloadWg2) so global config update is committed before assertions.

evidence: evidence: PR body explains TestPDConfHandler race (reloadFunc done before global config pointer Store), causing intermittent check failure.
evidence: diff adds an extra reload tick + wait group (`reloadWg2`) to ensure global config updated before assertions (config/config_handler_test.go).
